args.message: Thanks! So, has this 328i been in any accidents? And what kind of mileage does it get, roughly?

text: Thanks! So, has this 328i been in any accidents? And what kind of mileage does it get, roughly?

speaker: seller

args.message: Accidents? Not on my watch! This car has been meticulously cared for, no accidents to speak of. As for mileage, you're looking at fantastic fuel economy for a BMW of this caliber, easily getting around 25 MPG combined. This sporty sedan is a dream to drive, and it runs and drives beautifully, as the ad says, beautifully!
